prompt: Create a cinematic vertical anime illustration of Rinne Tao, a futuristic idol guitarist captured mid-live performance from a dramatic low angle. The character is shown in left-facing side profile with a short glossy dark teal-black bob, straight bangs, a small messy bun at the back, pale skin, and a calm focused expression with one visible green eye. She wears oversized circular silver mechanical headphones integrated with metallic headgear, plus shiny robotic prosthetic arms and hands with chrome joints and small warm gold accents. Her outfit is a black stage jacket over a frilly cream-and-white blouse and ruffled skirt, with decorative flower patches and small pins on the chest, mixing gothic idol fashion with cybernetic hardware. She is playing a mustard yellow Telecaster-style electric guitar with a white pickguard, chrome bridge, black pickup, two silver control knobs, and a pale maple neck rising diagonally upward to the right; one robotic hand strums near the pickguard while the other holds the neck. Use bright backlit concert lighting against an almost pure white background, warm golden highlights, shallow depth of field, soft motion blur on the extended arm and guitar neck, subtle floating dust or confetti specks, glossy reflections on metal surfaces, and a small blue lens flare near the lower robotic forearm. The composition should feel like a candid live-show moment processed into polished high-end anime key art, suitable as a T-shirt original artwork. Keep the image text-free, with no logo, no watermark, and no extra characters.
